evidence: Walmart combines stores, ecommerce and fulfillment assets around an everyday-low-price proposition.
Advertising and membership mechanisms complement merchandise revenue.
Supply-chain productivity and inventory availability are material operating factors.
Sustaining the everyday-low-price proposition is a customer-trust execution risk.

nodes.label: Membership fee revenue recognized over active terms

evidence: Salesforce operates an integrated customer platform with subscription and support revenue.
Data Cloud and Agentforce connect enterprise data, workflows and autonomous agents.
Adoption depends on security, privacy, reliability and customer trust.

nodes.label: Model inference and service delivery cost

evidence: Microsoft delivers cloud and AI services through a global datacenter infrastructure.
Demand for AI services requires substantial investment in compute capacity and energy.
Cloud value and recurring revenue depend on availability, security and capacity execution.
NVIDIA provides accelerated computing platforms spanning processors, systems, networking and software.
Manufacturing and advanced packaging depend on external foundries and supply partners.
NVIDIA serves developers through an installed platform software ecosystem.
Home Depot serves do-it-yourself and professional customers through stores and interconnected retail.
Professional customers value product availability, delivery, credit and job-site services.
Housing and project demand are cyclical.
Professional fulfillment includes complex orders and last-mile delivery.

nodes.label: Housing cycle and project demand volatility

evidence: Intuit operates a connected platform across consumer and small-business financial workflows.
Data and AI can connect tax, accounting, payments, credit and marketing decisions.
Use of sensitive financial data is constrained by consent, security and regulation.

nodes.label: Predict and recommend next financial action
Data AI and expert service cost

evidence: FedEx operates integrated air and ground transportation networks.
Network 2.0 and DRIVE target structural cost and operating efficiency improvements.
Shipment volume and mix vary while service reliability remains central to customer value.

nodes.label: Aircraft vehicle labor and fuel cost

evidence: NIKE develops and markets athletic footwear, apparel and equipment through direct and wholesale channels.
Demand creation, product innovation and marketplace presentation shape brand demand.
Inventory, markdowns and channel traffic can pressure revenue and margins.
Oracle provides cloud infrastructure, applications, database software and support.
Cloud expansion requires substantial datacenter capacity and long-term infrastructure commitments.
Customers value integrated data, applications and compute while competition affects adoption.

nodes.label: Cloud services and license support revenue

evidence: P&G sells branded consumer products through retail and ecommerce channels.
Consumer understanding, product innovation and brand building support demand and pricing.
Retail concentration and channel relationships create commercial and execution constraints.
